title: Heuristic Entry
description: A single captured instance of a Sovereign's gut decision, extracted via the 3-question Intuition Capture Protocol. Stored under knowledge/confidential/heuristics/.

mission_id.description: Mission that surfaced this decision, if any.

decision.description: The decision the Sovereign made (short summary, <= 200 chars).

anchor.description: First word / name / number that surfaced in the Sovereign's mind (Q1).

vetoed_options.description: Options that briefly appeared and were immediately dismissed (Q2).

analogy.description: What past situation did this feel similar to (Q3).

tags.description: Free-form tags for later clustering (e.g., hiring, funding, architecture).

outcome_ref.description: Once the decision plays out, link to the outcome record for retrospective validation.
